title: 2024-12-23 12Z (Mon)  --  approximate, hand-traced from WPC archive
_source: Hand-traced from WPC Surface Analysis archive PNG, https://www.wpc.ncep.noaa.gov/archives/web_pages/sfc/sfc_archive.php. Positions are eyeballed at roughly 1 deg precision. See spike-notes.md for the limitation.
_pattern_summary: Late December 2024: deep low over eastern Canada/Great Lakes leading a long cold front through the Mid-Atlantic and Southeast; trailing warm front off the Carolinas; Pacific cold front pushing through PNW into the northern Plains; broad high in the Intermountain West and a second high off the Southeast coast (subtropical ridge).

fronts._label: Long cold front trailing eastern low through Mid-Atlantic into Gulf
Warm front extending east off the Carolinas
Pacific cold front entering PNW, into northern Plains
Stationary front across central Texas / southern Plains
Occluded segment north of the Great Lakes low
